label: French-election
narrative: I want to learn about the presidential election in France. Who are the candidates? What are the driving issues?

questions.question: Who is Emmanuel Macron?
Who is Marine Le Pen?
What were the most pressing issues for French voters?
What were Macron's campaign promises?
What were Le Pen's campaign promises?
How has the war in Ukraine factored into this election?
Why was voter turnout so low?
Who were the other 10 candidates in the first round of the election?
What are the requirements to run for President in France?

label: Imaging-satellite-proliferation
narrative: This topic examines the number and types of imaging satellites being put into various orbits by States and commercial entities and to determine the nature of the imagery being collected -- e.g. electro-optical, thermal, other -- the customer base; its role within a constellation of satellites, if any; determine if the satellite is exquisite or less sophisticated; any issues associated with the system; and to identify any failed launches.

questions.question: Is the satellite a state sponsored imaging system?
If this is a state sponsored imaging satellite, who are the corporate partners?
Is this strictly a commercial venture, if so, what commercial entities are involved?
When was the satellite launched and what is its life cycle expectancy?
Will the satellite be part of a constellation of imaging satellites that may include relay satellites?
Have there been any failed launches or post-launch issues of the satellite or any components--for example, relay satellites--of the constellation?
Is this considered an "exquisite" or less expensive and more easily replaceable imaging satellite?
What types of imaging--e.g. optical, radar, thermal or hyperspectral--are performed by the satellite?
Does the satellite have capabilities other than imaging?
What is the satellites orbital pattern--e.g. Polar or Equitoreal?
In which altitude the satellite or constellation operate?  (e.g. low- medium- or high-earth orbit)
Are there any limiting factors or potential threats to the employment of the satellite?
What are the launch locations for satellites?
Who is the customer base for the satellites products?
How is the satellite imagery being exploited? And what are examples of its utility?
